title: ilauke 12Pcs Christmas Artificial Pine Branches Gold, 20cm Christmas Picks and Sprays, Artificial Holly Stem with Berries and Pine Cones, Xmas Greenery Tree Picks for Wreaths, Festive Decor
features: Sophisticated Champagne Gold Hue: Elevate your holiday decor with this exquisite Christmas tree decorations set in a trendy champagne gold colour. This elegant alternative to traditional red and green offers a luxurious, modern vibe that complements any existing colour scheme.

Value Package: You will receive 12 pieces of artificial pine picks. Each Christmas pine branches measures approximately 20cm/7.9 inches in height, a perfect size for decorating Christmas trees, crafting wreaths, adorning gift wraps, and more.

Premium & Realistic Material: : These artificial holly stems are expertly crafted from high-quality PE with flexible wired branches, allowing you to bend and shape them effortlessly for perfect arrangements. The golden berries with glitter and pine cones are vivid and eye-catching, both striking and durable, suitable for long-term use.

Widely Use: This Christmas berry needles is a good prop for decorating houses, perfect Christmas tree decoration. Ideal for Christmas tree decoration, DIY Christmas garland wreath, Christmas centerpieces, holiday floral arrangement, table setting decorations, mantle decoration, Vase or Canister Bouquet of Flowers, Christmas gift wrapping, winter wedding floral decorations and more.

Christmas Tree Decoration: Beautiful Christmas pine branches with glitter decorations make your pine needles look beautiful in the light, making your Christmas tree decorations look even prettier and you'll receive more compliments.
